message:
Fix json_simd module import for import json support

- Add copyJsonSimd() to copy SIMD files from shared/json/simd to .build
- Patch json_simd imports to use correct relative paths based on depth
- Files in json/ use simd/dispatch.zig
- Files in json/parse/ or json/parse_direct/ use ../simd/dispatch.zig

import json now compiles past the module resolution stage.
Still has type errors in generated code (separate issue).
